prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a young Asian woman with a short black bob haircut and bangs, seen in profile. She is smoking a cigarette, holding it to her lips with her right hand, with a thin trail of blue smoke rising. She is leaning against a metal balcony railing at night. She wears a white camisole and a light grey oversized cardigan that has slipped off her shoulder, exposing her bare shoulder and back. She has a small pearl earring. The background is dark with blurred, out-of-focus warm city lights. The image features a cinematic, moody atmosphere with noticeable film grain and a direct flash photography aesthetic.
